penalties.description: Visible cutting deviations from the marked circle line, particularly in the final quarter of the circle.

reasoning: Task appears completed with the marked circle cut out by frame 19. Timing start and finish are observable. Some deviation from the marked circle line is visible during the cutting process. The gauze was properly secured and the circle was completely freed. Final cut product shows the circle was extracted successfully despite some path deviations.
